name: StickyBar
usage_hint: Sticky bottom bar that appears after scrolling past the main BuyBox. Shows product thumbnail, price, and quick add-to-cart CTA.
when_to_use: Use on PDP pages below the fold to re-surface add-to-cart after the user scrolls past the main BuyBox. Provides persistent purchase access during product review/description reading.
when_not_to_use: Not for initial purchase UI (use BuyBox). Not for collection pages (use QuickAdd in cards). Not if your layout keeps BuyBox always visible (e.g., sticky sidebar).
combine_with: BuyBox (StickyBar appears AFTER scrolling past BuyBox)
ProductGallery or ProductHero (provides context above the fold)
anti_patterns: Using StickyBar without BuyBox: StickyBar is a follow-up CTA, not the primary purchase interface
Omitting showAfter or misconfiguring it: bar may appear too early or not at all
Missing CartDrawer: users get no cart feedback after clicking the sticky bar CTA
Using on collection pages: wrong pattern; use QuickAdd in ProductCard instead

examples.label: Sticky bar with custom trigger selector
